channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former NBA players indicted in alleged sports betting scheme
item.description: Ex-NBA players Malik Beasley and Edward Davis have been indicted for their alleged involvement in a sports gambling scheme.

item.title: San Francisco Archdiocese files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy over child abuse claims
item.description: The Archdiocese of San Francisco has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy following numerous child sexual abuse allegations.

item.title: JetBlue flight reports striking drone while landing at JFK
item.description: A JetBlue pilot reported hitting a drone during approach to JFK Airport on Monday morning, according to the FAA.

item.title: Path forward for U.S.-Iran talks unclear after weekend strikes
item.description: Iran denied its negotiators would meet with U.S. officials in Qatar after President Trump said talks would resume at Tehran's request.
